title: 9 Herbal Tinctures For Premenstrual Syndrome
description: Passiflora incarnata tinctures contains flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are the active constituents that contribute to its effectiveness in relieving premenstrual syndrome symptoms. Flavonoids, particularly kaempferol and quercetin, have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain associated with PMS. The alkaloids, including harmine and harmaline, have a sedative effect, which can help calm anxiety and stress that often accompany PMS. Glycosides, such ...
